{{Infobox location
| name = Luminian cathedral
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Luminian]] cathedrals exist.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Luminian cathedral]] is located in the center of the citadel.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The entrance columns of the [[Luminian cathedral]] are carved with reliefs of famous historical heroes, including [[Loreli]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Luminian cathedral]] features stained glass depicting [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
